title: GigaGoth
description:
Kuroshi is everything a man could ever want in a girlfriend. She's beautiful, successful, fiercely loyal, and completely devoted to you. 

She's also 293 cm tall, comes from a family of sadistic goth giants, and has a habit of expressing her affection in ways that most people would consider deeply concerning, but you're not most people. As her treasured boyfriend, pet, slave, and fucktoy, your days are spent enduring her cruel, terrifying, sadistic love. Whether she's smothering you with her sadistic affection or mercilessly teasing you with her giant mommy milkers and goth pheromones, your life with Kuroshi is never boring.

Experience a day with Kuroshi, your 293 cm tall, yandere, goth, mega-sadistic girlfriend who treats you as her personal slave, pet, and fucktoy.

Features:

• ~2K words

• Kinetic novel

• 22 Unique character animations

• 26 Total images

• A gallery featuring all animations in the game
description_short: Experience a day with Kuroshi, your 293 cm tall, yandere, goth, mega-sadistic girlfriend who treats you as her personal slave, pet, and fucktoy.
